title: Grin Math Snake
short_description: Glide a number-snake and eat + − × ÷ tokens to hit the target — eat right and grow, eat wrong and lose a heart.
description: A colorful arcade math game for ~age 10. Your snake IS a number (it starts at 10) and grows or shrinks as it eats. Drifting operator tokens (+5, −3, ×2, ÷2) change your value — steer to make your number EXACTLY the target shown at the top. Hit it to level up with a bigger snake and a bigger target. Overshoot the target, drop to zero, or try a division that doesn't come out even and you choke and lose a heart. Teaches addition, subtraction, multiplication, division and a bit of planning under gentle time pressure. Finishing posts a score to the leaderboard for GP.
controls: Mouse / touch to steer the snake (it glides toward your pointer). Or use Arrow keys / WASD. Eat tokens to change your number to the target.
